content_screens.title: Productivity Focus Areas
content_screens.content: Select each card to open a short explanation and visual.

cards.title: Time Management
cards.description: Time management is about planning your day around priorities so high-impact tasks get completed first, not just urgent tasks.

cards.title: Deep Work
cards.description: Deep work means focused, distraction-free effort on one meaningful task for a set block of time to produce better quality results.

cards.title: Collaboration
cards.description: Collaboration aligns teammates through clear communication, shared goals, and transparent updates so projects move faster together.

content_screens.title: Deep Work Question
content_screens.question: Which environment is most conducive to 'Deep Work'?
options: B. Quiet space with no notifications

content_screens.title: Topic A: Foundations

content_screens.title: Module Summary
content_screens.content: You have completed all core topics. Proceed to the knowledge check.

assessment.instructions: Answer the following questions to test your knowledge. You must score 80% or higher to pass.

questions.question: Sample Question 1: What is the primary purpose of this module?
Sample Question 2: Which feature ensures accessibility for screen readers?
